name: chain__post_how_much_do_you_think_this_app_is
method: post: how much do you think this app is worth? | content: /r/appbusiness is the place for app developers, marketers and entrepreneurs to discuss news and ideas around the business of mobile apps.topi

stages.task: Scrape /r/appbusiness posts tagged valuation/selling/acquisition. Extract: app name, stated revenue, asking price, tech stack, platform (iOS/Android/web)

Compute valuation multiple (price/annual_revenue). Flag: undervalued (<2.5x) as BUY opportunities, fairly valued (2.5-4x) as BROKER opportunities, overvalued (>4x) as CONTENT opportunities (write about why overpriced). Score each 1-10 on deal quality.
For BUY opportunities: draft acquisition inquiry DM. For BROKER opportunities: draft valuation consultation offer. For CONTENT: generate thread about app valuation mistakes.
